hero.title: Where Talent Meets Opportunity
hero.subtitle: The official Pi Browser platform for sports discovery. Mine SMTK tokens, showcase your skills, and connect with global scouts.

ecosystem.title: Platform Ecosystem
ecosystem.mission_desc: Complete tasks to earn XP and boost your scout visibility.
ecosystem.mining_desc: Activate your session daily to generate community tokens.
ecosystem.leaderboard_desc: Climb the ranks and get noticed by professional clubs.

features.ranking_desc: AI-driven potential scoring and verified activity tracking for elite talent discovery.
features.synergy_desc: Direct messaging between scouts and players with persistence and instant notifications.
features.museum_desc: Showcase your highlights in an immersive A-Frame metaverse hall for virtual scouting.

login.title: Pi login for sports discovery.
login.desc: Use Pi authentication to unlock the full ScoutMe loop, save your language, sport, level, streak, and wallet in Firestore, and auto-login on return.
login.mission_desc: Daily missions, streaks, scout level, mining and spin rewards.
login.lang_desc: Arabic RTL included with persistent preference in Firestore.
login.pi_desc: Boost profile, unlock contacts, Hall of Fame entry, club subscription.
login.pi_notice: Open this page inside Pi Browser for full authentication and payment support.

chat.title: Direct Messages
chat.empty: No previous messages. Start a conversation!

shop.title: Pi Sports Shop
shop.subtitle: Boost your career with Pi tokens.
shop.boost_desc: 7 days of high visibility to scouts.
shop.contact_desc: Unlock message access to any club.
shop.hall_desc: Instant premium card in the Metaverse.
